location.label: Store Location
location.help: Plakar store path or URL (e.g. /plakar-store or s3://bucket/prefix)

passphrase.label: Encryption Passphrase
passphrase.help: Passphrase used to encrypt snapshots. Leave empty for unencrypted stores.

s3AccessKey.label: S3 / MinIO Access Key
s3AccessKey.help: Access key for S3 or MinIO stores. Leave empty for local stores.

s3SecretKey.label: S3 / MinIO Secret Key
s3SecretKey.help: Secret key for S3 or MinIO stores.

s3UseTls.label: Use TLS
s3UseTls.help: Enable TLS for S3 / MinIO connections. Default: true.

s3StorageClass.label: S3 Storage Class
s3StorageClass.help: S3 storage class (e.g. STANDARD, STANDARD_IA, GLACIER). Leave empty for default.

paths.label: Snapshot Paths
paths.help: Paths to snapshot. Defaults to the agent workspace directory.

timeout.label: Snapshot Timeout (ms)
timeout.help: Maximum time to wait for a snapshot operation. Default: 15000.

location.description: Plakar store path or URL (e.g. /data/plakar-store or s3://bucket/prefix)

passphrase.description: Encryption passphrase for the store. Passed via PLAKAR_PASSPHRASE env var.

s3UseTls.description: Enable TLS for S3 / MinIO connections

s3StorageClass.description: S3 storage class (e.g. STANDARD, STANDARD_IA, GLACIER)

paths.description: Paths to snapshot. Defaults to the agent workspace directory.
